berths.title: Berths & Transit
berths.description: Safe and secure mooring for your vessel in the heart of Dalmatia, with complete modern infrastructure.

crane.title: Crane & Dry Berth
crane.description: Professional vessel lifting and launching services, along with secure dry storage facilities.

sports.title: Sports Sections
sports.description: Rich programs in competitive sailing and fishing, actively fostering youth development and enthusiasts.

footer.description: Maritime Sports Club Špinut has been managing the sports harbour in Split since 1954.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Tradition and passion for the sea since 1954.
about.historyText: Maritime Sports Club Špinut was founded in 1954. Over the decades, we have grown into one of the most important marinas and sports associations in Split, nurturing the tradition of sailing, fishing, and maritime skills.
about.concessionText: The club holds a concession to manage the marina, ensuring continuous investment in infrastructure, ecology, and the safety of all our members.
about.managementText: Our society is managed by a body of long-time members who volunteer to improve the port and preserve our Mediterranean way of life.
about.clubsText: PŠD Špinut includes sports clubs that achieve notable results in national and international competitions.

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Everything you need for a carefree stay at sea.
servicesPage.berthsDesc: The marina accommodates over 700 berths from categories A to F. All berths are equipped with power (16A/32A) and water. We have reserved special fully serviced spots for transit guests.
servicesPage.craneDesc: Our modern 15-ton crane allows for safe vessel lifting and launching. Operating hours are from 08:00 to 14:00 on weekdays.
servicesPage.dryBerthDesc: We offer dry berth services for long-term land storage, ideal for the winter months or major maintenance work.

ecology.title: Ecology & Sea Protection
ecology.subtitle: Preserving our natural wealth for future generations.
ecology.ecomapDesc: PŠD Špinut is a proud participant in the EU ECOMAP project, aimed at improving sea quality and equipping sports marinas with ecological infrastructure.
practicesList: Modern recycling point for all waste types (paper, plastic, glass, hazardous waste).
Strict prohibition of wastewater discharge within the marina waters.
Regular underwater cleaning campaigns in cooperation with the Špinut Diving Club.
Mandatory use of eco-friendly washing agents at the slipway.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Moments from the marina in pictures.
